CustomField.description: Please search for internal documentation 'Configuration of summary fields on Deal' to read detailed instructions on how to configure these fields
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Free text + 'tag numbers' (starting with 0 and surrounded by curly brackets) for the Deal summary. Ex: Assets Summary: {0}, Terms Summary: {1}. Note: use line breaks if/where needed.
CustomField.label: Deal Summary Configuration
